title: Merry Christas Everyone!
author: edgarmoria
selftext: Can't wait to share my automated strategy with you. Check out these stats. It's gonna be a great way to start 2026. If you want me to let you know when the website is live join the waiting list at automatedalgos.com!

comments.author: NegativeControl7507
comments.body: That's actually nice! Since how long you're using this and what's the results so far?

comments.author: FewW0rdDoTrick
comments.body: If you believe that equity curve is real... I've got a bridge to sell you ;)

replies.author: edgarmoria
replies.body: It's been running live on a prop account for the past 6 months. Apart from a few ticks slippage I can guarantee you it is :)

replies.author: FewW0rdDoTrick
replies.body: It's not plausible, so I simply do not believe you.

replies.author: FewW0rdDoTrick
replies.body:
Sure thing. Then why did you post this comment on Reddit 1 month ago?

"Quick question to everyone. Do you know how to setup an automated trading bot? Just figuring the kind of info I need to include on the website."

replies.author: edgarmoria
replies.body: Because I'm running an automated strategy and I want to know if that's common knowledge or if I should include instructions on how to do that on the website where I intend to sell the strategy subscription :)
